message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 日志系统架构时序图

participant "Database" as DB
participant "ManageLogDemo" as Demo
participant "ManageLogReceiveFacade" as ReceiveFacade
participant "ManageLogReceiveProvider" as ReceiveProvider
participant "ManageLogCommon" as Common
participant "AnotherJavaProject" as JavaProject
participant "ManageLogUploadFacade" as UploadFacade
participant "AnotherProject" as Project
participant "ManageLogQueryProvider" as QueryProvider
participant "ManageLogQueryFacade" as QueryFacade

rectangle "rpc 上传日志" {
    Demo -> ReceiveFacade: aspect 获取数据
    activate ReceiveFacade
    ReceiveFacade -> ReceiveProvider: rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    activate ReceiveProvider
    ReceiveProvider -> Common: 使用工具类
    activate Common
    Common --> Common: 抓取配置
    deactivate Common
    ReceiveProvider --> Demo: 落地数据
    deactivate ReceiveProvider
    deactivate ReceiveFacade
}

rectangle "自主使用 facade 上传日志" {
    JavaProject -> ReceiveFacade: 自己组装数据，使用 facade 提供的策略上传
    activate ReceiveFacade
    ReceiveFacade -> UploadFacade: rpc/http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    activate UploadFacade
    UploadFacade -> Common: 使用工具类
    activate Common
    Common --> Common: 抓取配置
    deactivate Common
    UploadFacade --> JavaProject: 落地数据
    deactivate UploadFacade
    deactivate ReceiveFacade
}

rectangle "自主上传日志" {
    Project -> ReceiveProvider: http/kafka，数据为业务数据，configName
    activate ReceiveProvider
    ReceiveProvider -> Common: 使用工具类
    activate Common
    Common --> Common: 抓取配置
    deactivate Common
    ReceiveProvider --> Project: 落地数据
    deactivate ReceiveProvider
}

rectangle "日志查询" {
    Demo -> QueryProvider: 获取数据
    activate QueryProvider
    QueryProvider -> QueryFacade: rpc 提供
    activate QueryFacade
    QueryFacade --> QueryProvider: http 提供（默认）
    deactivate QueryFacade
    deactivate QueryProvider
}

@enduml
```
